mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE menu_type IN ('M', 'C') ORDER BY parent_id, order_num

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.menu_type IN ('M', 'C') ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.order_num
